markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy kick-off and reset between Innerwell and GrowthX to align on goals, understand Innerwell's business, and discuss new growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Innerwell aims to be a modern mental health practice offering cutting-edge treatments (85% revenue from ketamine) alongside traditional therapy/psychiatry](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes a two-pronged SEO strategy: city-level pages and programmatic content creation for conditions/symptoms](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Execution speed and quality are critical for Innerwell to regain confidence in the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Innerwell faces challenges in scaling content creation due to medical review requirements](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)

## Topics

### Current Business Model and Offerings

  - [85% of revenue from ketamine-assisted therapy, aiming for 60/40 split with traditional services in the future](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Expanded to 27 states, targeting 35 by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Significant focus on insurance coverage to increase accessibility](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Offers ketamine therapy, EMDR, psychiatry, and traditional therapy](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Positioned as a modern behavioral healthcare practice with access to cutting-edge treatments](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - Main ketamine competitor: Mindbloom (Innerwell is \#2 in the market)
  - [Broader competition: Headway, BetterHelp, Talkspace](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [Differentiation: Insurance coverage for ketamine, comprehensive care options, clinical rigor](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Provider Recruitment and Value Proposition

  - [Strong inbound interest from providers due to:](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
    1.  Novel treatment modalities (especially ketamine)
    2.  Insurance coverage
    3.  Clinical rigor and training opportunities
  - [Currently maintaining 3-5 day appointment availability in most markets](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)

### Proposed Growth Strategy

1.  City-level SEO:
      - [Creating extensive city/county pages](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [Leveraging existing data for provider profiles and listings](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
2.  Programmatic content creation:
      - [Building a database of conditions, symptoms, and topics](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
      - [Creating long-tail, personalized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [Balancing medical review requirements with scalability](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)

### Execution Challenges

  - [Need for efficient medical review process for scaled content creation](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Potential bottlenecks in CMS (Prismic) and content publishing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to regroup and shape up both city-level and editorial programmatic strategies](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [Present a database for both strategies by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1993.0)
  - [Address any remaining bottlenecks in content creation and publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Continue parallel weekly meetings with the broader team](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
  - [Follow up on design and development resource needs, exploring alternatives to Prismic CMS](https://fathom.video/share/epfAs36HP49y2Cfk8Hxh4mvyMFK9q5qJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)
